conceptual.label: Conceptual and mental-model review
conceptual.rationale: The topic is primarily definitions, mental models, comparisons, or framework purpose. Scenario MCQs are more appropriate than forced code trivia.

workflow.label: Developer workflow and decision scenarios
workflow.rationale: The learner should make realistic development decisions using requirements, logs, file structures, configuration, or short code artifacts.

hybrid.label: Mental model plus practical code reasoning
hybrid.rationale: The topic combines an important model with implementation consequences, so both explanation and code reasoning are required.

coding.label: Code-reading, debugging, and implementation challenge
coding.rationale: The topic represents a day-to-day coding skill. The topic quiz must primarily test code reading, debugging, output prediction, or implementation choice.
